hero.subtitle: Building innovative solutions for fintech at DDC Company

work.title: My Journey
work.subtitle: From code to impact
work.currentRole: Fullstack Software Engineer at DDC Company
work.currentDescription: Developing cutting-edge solutions for brokers and investors at a São Paulo-based startup. Building solutions that impact lives through technology.
work.journeyDescription: My software engineering journey began in 2021 while living in Germany. What started as curiosity turned into passion, leading me to transition my career into software development. Today, at DDC Company, I combine my technical skills with my multicultural experience to create solutions that connect markets. I've contributed to projects for clients in Brazil, Germany, and the United Kingdom.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: Tools I use to build amazing things

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Beyond the code
about.intro: I'm a fullstack software engineer who believes great code starts with great thinking. I focus on understanding business needs, making strategic architectural decisions, and building solutions that deliver real value. For me, engineering is about solving problems—not just writing code.
about.polyglot: As a polyglot speaking Portuguese, English, and German, I bring a unique multicultural perspective to every project. My time living in Europe taught me more than just another language. It taught me how to adapt, collaborate across cultures, and think globally.
about.passion: Outside of work, I'm a father and a dedicated Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu practitioner. Training keeps my mind sharp and my problem-solving instincts honed. The discipline from the mats carries directly into my code. Continuous improvement is a lifestyle, not just a career goal.

contact.title: Let's Connect!
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations
contact.languages: I can communicate in Portuguese, English, and German. Feel free to reach out. :)
